data.title: Crypto Trader Closes BTC and HYPE Positions, Holds Leveraged ETH
data.description: Hyperbot data reveals that prominent trader Huang Licheng has closed his BTC and HYPE long positions. According to Odaily, he currently maintains a 25x leveraged long position on 8,200 ETH, with a liquidation price of $2,002. The total value of his position stands at $17.54 million, with an unrealized profit of $465,000. Additionally, he has placed 33 ETH limit sell orders in the $2,141-$2,200 range. Over the past week, Huang Licheng closed 10 trades, achieving a profit in 8 of them, resulting in an 80% success rate.

data.title: Circle's Arc Blockchain Unveils Post-Quantum Security Roadmap
data.description:
Circle's Arc blockchain has announced a roadmap for post-quantum security design, aiming to proactively defend against potential threats posed by quantum computing to blockchain technology. According to Foresight News, the roadmap focuses on ensuring end-to-end security for wallets, private states, validators, and infrastructure.

The plan includes supporting quantum-resistant wallet signature schemes upon the mainnet launch. In the short term, quantum-resistant private state protection will be implemented through private virtual machines. Over the medium to long term, there will be gradual upgrades to infrastructure and validator signatures.

Arc's quantum-resistant design features full-stack coverage and user-selectable options, supporting quantum-resistant wallets and private smart contract state protection. It is also compatible with the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) ecosystem, avoiding the need for large-scale mandatory migrations.

data.title: CZ Shares Book Excerpt Recounting Binance's Tense Launch Moment on July 14, 2017
data.description: Changpeng Zhao (CZ), founder of Binance, shared an excerpt from his book Freedom of Money on X,  recounting the moment Binance went live on July 14, 2017. The passage describes the team counting down to launch with the BNB trading page open, only to see the screen flood immediately with sell orders and no buy orders. As a handful of bids appeared at low prices they were quickly taken, and BNB's price began to decline. "This is not good, right?" CZ writes that he murmured. The room, initially filled with anticipation, fell silent. The personal memoir titled: Freedom of Money: A Memoir of Protecting Users, Resilience, and the Founding of Binance, is scheduled for release on April 8, 2026.

data.title: Brother Machi has closed all his long positions in BTC and HYPE, achieving a win rate of 80% over the past week.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Huang Licheng, nicknamed "Machi Dage," closed all his long positions in BTC and HYPE this morning. He currently holds a 25x leveraged long position in Ethereum (ETH) of 8200 ETH, with a liquidation price of $2002. His current total position value is $17.54 million, with a floating profit of $465,000. He also placed 33 limit sell orders for ETH in the $2141-$2200 range. Looking at his trading data over the past week, Machi Dage closed 10 positions, with 8 of them profitable, resulting in an 80% win rate.

data.title: WTI Crude Oil Declines Below $110 Amid Market Volatility
data.description: WTI crude oil prices have dropped below $110 per barrel, experiencing a 2.06% decline intraday. According to NS3.AI, this decrease reflects ongoing market volatility and investor concerns over global economic conditions. The oil market has been influenced by various factors, including geopolitical tensions and fluctuating demand forecasts, contributing to the current price movement.

data.title: Brother Machi Closes BTC and HYPE Long Positions Amid High Win Rate
data.description: Brother Machi has closed all his Bitcoin (BTC) and HYPE long positions this morning. According to NS3.AI, Hyperbot data revealed an 80% win rate across 10 closed trades over the past week. Despite these closures, Brother Machi continues to maintain a 25x leveraged Ethereum long position, backed by 8,200 ETH.

data.title: Bluefin Introduces Portfolio Feature on Sui-Based Derivatives Platform
data.description: Bluefin has unveiled a new portfolio feature for its derivatives platform built on the Sui blockchain. According to NS3.AI, this tool integrates net assets, open positions, and profit and loss across various trading activities, including perpetual futures, spot trading, lending, liquidity pools, and vaults, into a single interface. This enhancement aims to streamline user experience by providing a comprehensive view of trading activities in one place.

data.title: WTI crude oil fell back below $110 per barrel, down 2.06% on the day.
data.description: According to Gate data, WTI crude oil fell back below $110 per barrel, down 2.06% on the day.

data.title: Japanese and South Korean stock markets rose during trading.
data.description: According to Gate data, South Korea's KOSPI index climbed above 5,500 points, up 2.28% on the day. Japan's Nikkei 225 index touched 54,000 points, up 1.68% on the day.

data.title: Expert Warns CLARITY Crypto Bill Faces Challenges Amid Political Shifts
data.description: John E. Deaton has expressed concerns regarding the future of the CLARITY crypto market structure bill. According to NS3.AI, Deaton highlighted that if Congress does not take action before the summer, the bill might face significant hurdles. He noted that a Democratic victory in both the House and the Senate could position Senator Elizabeth Warren to chair the Senate Banking Committee, potentially making it difficult for the bill to pass.

data.title: AI TRENDS | ZetaChain Integrates Alibaba's Qwen 3.6-Plus into Anuma AI Layer
data.description: ZetaChain has integrated Alibaba's Qwen 3.6-Plus into its Anuma AI layer, enhancing its capabilities with a model that features a one million-token context window. According to NS3.AI, OpenRouter highlights Qwen 3.6-Plus as the largest AI model in China and the global leader in terms of token count.

data.title: US media: US-Iran mediators make final efforts to secure a 45-day ceasefire.
data.description: Four sources familiar with the negotiations from the United States, Israel, and the region revealed that the U.S., Iran, and a group of regional mediators are discussing the terms of a potential 45-day ceasefire agreement that could ultimately end the war. The sources said the chances of reaching a partial agreement within the next 48 hours are slim, but this last-ditch effort is the only chance to prevent a sharp escalation of the war. President Trump's 10-day deadline for Iran was originally set to expire Monday evening. However, Trump extended the deadline by 20 hours on Sunday and posted a new deadline on his social media platform, "Truth Social": 8 p.m. Eastern Time on Tuesday. Trump told AXIOS on Sunday that the U.S. is engaged in "deep negotiations" with Iran and that an agreement is possible before his deadline expires on Tuesday. (AXIOS)

data.title: Trader Sells Significant Amounts of ETH and AAVE
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on April 6, Lookonchain reported that trader @thomasg_eth sold 11,409 ETH, valued at $23.47 million, two hours ago. Additionally, the trader sold 13,150 AAVE, worth $1.21 million.

data.title: New Wallet Initiates High-Leverage ETH Short Position on Hyperliquid
data.description: A newly created wallet address has deposited 3.98 million USDC into Hyperliquid, according to BlockBeats. Within the last two hours, the wallet opened a short position on 9,526 ETH using 20x leverage, with a nominal value of approximately $20.25 million. The position is currently experiencing an unrealized loss of around $255,000.

data.title: KB Financial Group to Strengthen Partnership with Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire
data.description: KB Financial Group is set to meet with Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire to enhance their collaborative efforts. According to NS3.AI, the partnership between the two companies began in June 2025, focusing on the use of USDC in South Korea, developing international payment solutions, and exploring the creation of a stablecoin based on the Korean won.

data.title: Bank of Japan Rate Hike Probability Rises to 70% for April Meeting
data.description: Markets are currently anticipating a significant likelihood of a rate hike by the Bank of Japan at its upcoming April meeting. According to NS3.AI, Tomohisa Fujiki of Citi Research has indicated that there is up to a 70% probability of this monetary policy adjustment. The anticipation has led to a rise in the 10-year Japanese government bond yield, which increased by 2 basis points to reach 2.400%, marking its highest intraday level since February 1999.

data.title: Circle's USDC Freeze Power Faces Allegations of Inconsistency
data.description: On-chain investigator ZachXBT has raised concerns about Circle's application of its USDC freeze power, alleging inconsistency in its actions. According to NS3.AI, ZachXBT highlighted 15 cases since 2022 involving over $420 million in allegedly illicit funds. Additionally, he referenced a sealed U.S. civil matter where 16 operational business wallets were blocked, with Circle subsequently unfreezing at least one wallet associated with Goated.com.

data.title: Tensions Escalate Between U.S. and Iran Over Infrastructure Threats
data.description: According to Odaily, analysts from Al Jazeera indicate that recent statements from U.S. President Donald Trump suggest no progress in negotiations or efforts to bridge the gap between Iran and the United States. In light of recent messages from Iran's Revolutionary Guard, which warned of equal retaliation against any attacks on civilian infrastructure, the situation has reached a critical juncture. Trump has threatened to destroy Iran's bridges and power plants, while Iran has vowed to retaliate in kind, targeting civilian infrastructure in the Gulf region and Israel.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Finds Short-Term Stability Amid Challenging Macro Environment
data.description: Gold prices have stabilized after a significant sell-off, finding a short-term foothold as positions are reset. According to Jin10, despite this stabilization, the macroeconomic backdrop remains challenging for the precious metal. The recent market dynamics have led to a recalibration of positions, providing some support to gold prices. However, broader economic factors continue to pose challenges, impacting the outlook for gold in the near term.

data.title: The dYdX community voted to approve the proposal to "gradually close 12 markets".
data.description: The dYdX community voted to approve the proposal to "gradually close 12 markets" with a 91.07% approval rate. The proposal includes the gradual closure of the following 12 trading markets: JASMY-USD, KOMA-USD, LINEA-USD, ME-USD, NEIRO-USD, PIPPIN-USD, RAY-USD, TRB-USD, TRY-USD, USDE-USD, YFI-USD, and ZEREBRO-USD.
